---
title: Process & Analyse
listing:
  - id: tools
    contents:
      - ../tools/ada/index.qmd
      - ../tools/vucomputehub/index.qmd
      - ../tools/researchcloud/index.qmd
      - ../topics/data-transfer.qmd
      - ../tools/scicloud/index.qmd
      - ../tools/snellius/index.qmd
    type: table
    table-striped: true
    table-hover: true
    fields: [title, reading-time]
  - id: guides
    contents: "../guides/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    include:
      categories: "Process & Analyse"
---

## Tools

:::{#tools}
:::

## Guides

:::{#guides}
:::
